description: Russian motorcycle club founded in 1989 by Alexander Zaldastanov. It has chapters worldwide and is known for its close ties to the Kremlin and involvement in pro-Russian political activities, including the annexation of Crimea and the war in Donbas. The club also runs rock clubs, tattoo parlors, and a clothing line.

country_links.evidence_quote: Location(s): Russia (formerly the Soviet Union) and other former Soviet territories, Ukraine, Latvia, Finland, Poland, Germany, Serbia, Australia, Romania, Slovakia, Belarus, Philippines, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Montenegro, Czech Republic, and North Macedonia
country_links.context: The Night Wolves have a chapter in Australia.
